signals.title: Astronauts briefly shelter in Dragon during ISS leak repair
signals.summary:
NASA instructed astronauts on the International Space Station to briefly shelter in a Dragon spacecraft June 5 as cosmonauts attempted to repair an air leak in a Russian module. 
 The post  Astronauts briefly shelter in Dragon during ISS leak repair  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Let’s build the moon base, but not lose sight of Mars
signals.summary:
These are heady days for NASA and the space industry. The Artemis 2 crew flew around the moon, traveling farther into space than any humans previously had; NASA announced an […] 
 The post  Let’s build the moon base, but not lose sight of Mars  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: U.S. bitcoin, ether ETFs end record multibillion outflow streak
Satellite maker Apex’s valuation rises to $2.3 billion after latest $200 million raise
signals.summary:
Apex has raised more than $200 million to expand in-house satellite production capabilities, announcing a funding round June 5 it says nearly doubled the four-year-old manufacturer’s valuation to $2.3 billion. 
 The post  Satellite maker Apex’s valuation rises to $2.3 billion after latest $200 million raise  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: HASC NDAA markup challenges Space Force on satellite programs
signals.summary:
House Armed Services Committee seeks to preserve a missile-warning satellite program the Pentagon wants to cancel. It also criticizes a recent tactical communications satellite procurement and GPS oversight 
 The post  HASC NDAA markup challenges Space Force on satellite programs  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Prediction market firms face growing scrutiny as Congress weighs regulation
signals.summary: Rep. Bryan Steil, R-Wisc., is working on a bill to ban Congress members and their staff from certain bets on prediction markets such as Kalshi and Polymarket.

signals.title: Qianfan constellation deployment hits 200 satellites with Long March 8 and 6A launches
signals.summary:
Construction of the Shanghai-led Qianfan constellation continued to accelerate this week with a pair of Long March launches, following on from two recent experimental flights. 
 The post  Qianfan constellation deployment hits 200 satellites with Long March 8 and 6A launches  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: NASA working to streamline development of nuclear electric propulsion demo mission
signals.summary:
NASA is working on a streamlined management approach for a nuclear electric propulsion demonstration mission the agency wants to launch in two and a half years. 
 The post  NASA working to streamline development of nuclear electric propulsion demo mission  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: SpaceX to raise at least $75 billion in IPO
signals.summary:
SpaceX plans to raise at least $75 billion in its initial public offering, valuing the company at more than $1.75 trillion. 
 The post  SpaceX to raise at least $75 billion in IPO  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: NASA declares end to MAVEN Mars mission
signals.summary:
NASA has formally ended a Mars mission that has been out of contact for six months while the investigation into the spacecraft’s demise continues. 
 The post  NASA declares end to MAVEN Mars mission  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Trump administration, OpenAI discussing possible government stake in the AI startup
signals.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman first shared the idea with the Trump administration in 2025, according to a source.

signals.title: Trump administration announces $850M to modernize US coal capacity, build 2 new plants
signals.summary: New coal-fired plants in Anchorage, Alaska, and Mt. Storm, West Virginia, would total 2.85 GW. They would be the first new U.S. coal plants to come online since 2013.

signals.title: DOE orders OUC’s 465-MW coal unit in Florida to continue running
signals.summary: Although Florida is at “normal risk” for long-term energy adequacy, the unit near Orlando needs to remain online partly to help serve potential data centers in the state, the department said.

signals.title: DOE’s Alex Fitzsimmons on energy markets, AI, renewables and more
signals.summary: Utility Dive caught up with the associate deputy secretary of energy at the Edison Electric Institute conference in Las Vegas, where the dominant theme was balancing demand growth with affordability.

signals.title: AST SpaceMobile sees New Glenn setback delaying initial commercial service into 2027
signals.summary:
AST SpaceMobile expects Blue Origin’s recent launchpad explosion will delay its direct-to-smartphone constellation by three to six months, investment bank William Blair said in an equity research note, pushing initial commercial services into the first half of 2027. 
 The post  AST SpaceMobile sees New Glenn setback delaying initial commercial service into 2027  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: AI is designing OpenAI's next model in a sign of 'superintelligence': SoftBank's Masayoshi Son to CNBC
signals.summary: SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son said his forecast of artificial superintelligence arriving in 10 years was "conservative" and thinks it will be here sooner.

signals.title: US forces board sanctioned tanker in Indian Ocean, Pentagon says
signals.summary: U.S. forces have intercepted multiple commercial and oil tankers in the Indian Ocean in recent months.

signals.title: Joint Chiefs head makes first official visit to post-Maduro Venezuela
signals.summary: The visit comes five months after the high-risk U.S. military operation to remove Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro.

signals.title: Iran's threats against this Red Sea choke point are a big vulnerability for the oil market
signals.summary: Oil prices would spike if Iran's Houthi allies started attacking ships passing through the Bab el-Mandeb Strait.

signals.title: Lockheed’s GRIZZLY C-UAS system downs attack drone in live-fire demo
signals.summary: The live-fire demonstration paired the radars, Sanctum software and launcher to destroy the target at Yuma Proving Ground, Arizona.

signals.title: Fervo Energy faces transmission constraints in the West, analysts say
signals.summary: “Management has highlighted [transmission constraints] as a risk factor ... citing behind-the-meter as a potential solution,” said Jefferies equity analyst Julien Dumoulin-Smith.

signals.title: Trump Accounts don't 'rule' child investments, advisor says: How your options compare
signals.summary: Trump Accounts, along with 529 plans, custodial accounts for minors and Roth IRAs, are all valuable options depending on the child's needs and long-term goals.

signals.title: Leaf Space partners with D-Orbit and EnduroSat to test connectivity service
signals.summary:
MILAN – Italian ground segment operator Leaf Space unveiled a new space connectivity service May 27. The technology, named TreeNet, aims to make space communications more seamless by treating individual […] 
 The post  Leaf Space partners with D-Orbit and EnduroSat to test connectivity service  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Meta's stock sinks on report company could raise tens of billions of dollars to fund AI push
signals.summary: Meta shares dropped after the Financial Times reported the company could potentially raise tens of billions of dollars in a stock offering to help its AI push.

signals.title: Bitcoin cracks $60,000, sinking to lowest level since October 2024
signals.summary: The weeklong sell-off was exacerbated after a stronger-than-expected May jobs report Friday sent yields higher and pressured risk assets.

signals.title: Marvell Technology and Flex to join S&P 500 index, replacing Pool and Campbell's
signals.summary: The move highlights the growing importance of the technology sector to the stock market.

signals.title: Mythos rejuvenated the cybersecurity sector. Earnings put the recent rally to the test
signals.summary: Mythos gave the cybersecurity sector a boost, but upbeat earnings weren't enough for investors in search of an AI payoff.

signals.title: Alphabet is seeking fresh capital as stock's 4-week losing streak tests investor appetite
signals.summary: Alphabet expects capex to reach up to $190 billion this year, double last year's spending, and the company is turning to investors to help fund its expansion.

signals.title: Boeing to start 737 Max production on new assembly line July 6, CEO says
signals.summary: The new 737 Max final assembly line in Everett, Washington, will serve as a catalyst for increasing Max production to 52 jets per month.

signals.title: [13F] Berkshire Hathaway (Buffett) — nuovo filing 2009-11-05
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: [13F] Pershing Square (Ackman) — nuovo filing 2024-07-29
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: [13F] Scion Asset Mgmt (Burry) — nuovo filing 2023-08-10
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: OpenAI says it will comply with Trump's order requiring AI model reviews before release
signals.summary: George Osborne, OpenAI's Head of Countries told CNBC that governments "have a big role to play in how this technology is used and deployed."

signals.title: Next Ariane 6 launch to carry 36 Amazon Leo satellites using upgraded boosters
signals.summary:
Amazon will fly its largest number of broadband satellites to date later this month on the first Ariane 6 launch to use upgraded boosters. 
 The post  Next Ariane 6 launch to carry 36 Amazon Leo satellites using upgraded boosters  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Huge fascist-era underground cisterns draw Western special forces to Italy for tunnel training
signals.summary: After resisting 150 bombing runs by the Allies in the Second World War, the cisterns continued to be used by the Italian Air Force to hold aviation fuel.

signals.title: The US Army wants thousands of air defense missiles to replace the Stinger
signals.summary: A new Army Request for Information seeks to identify companies that can deliver 11,000 next-gen, short range interceptors beginning in Fiscal Year 2028.

signals.title: UK running out of time to boost defense as investment plan stalls, military chief warns
signals.summary: Defence Minister John Healey said on Monday that Prime Minister Keir Starmer was determined to publish it before a July 7 NATO summit.

signals.title: Crypto mutiny on Strategy: Shorts target 'MSTR' in bitcoin bloodbath
signals.summary: Flows around Strategy (MSTR) and the company's variable-rate preferred stock STRC are turning bearish this week.

signals.title: Hot jobs report puts Fed cuts further out of reach as Chair Warsh faces policy tests
signals.summary: Another big jobs report in May has swept aside the possibility of interest rate cuts anytime soon.

signals.title: Apple's WWDC: Tim Cook's AI legacy at stake in his final developer conference as CEO
signals.summary: Apple heads into WWDC with Tim Cook’s AI legacy, Siri’s future as an agentic platform, and the stock’s rich valuation all on the line.

signals.title: As AI-related stocks dive, the market's winners have one thing in common
signals.summary: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

signals.title: Model routing is a fix for AI overspending. That's a problem for OpenAI and Anthropic
signals.summary: Companies are shifting from running everything on the most powerful AI model to matching each task to the right one, a practice called model routing.

signals.title: Colorado co-op delivers 100% renewables in March, a first
signals.summary: Holy Cross Energy CEO Bryan Hannegan said the utility plans to expand its programs for smart electrification and demand flexibility, and selectively add new flexible renewable resources.

signals.title: Protesters target NV Energy at electric utility conference as anger over affordability rises
signals.summary: “In Las Vegas, one of the fastest warming cities in the country, you cannot live without electricity,” said protest organizer Leslie Vega, who said she’s lost loved ones to heatstroke.

signals.title: Electric sector needs firm gas supply to protect grid reliability, gas industry report says
signals.summary: The report, prepared for the Natural Gas Council, applauded reforms introduced following Winter Storm Uri in 2021 but said better coordination between the gas and electric sectors is still needed.

signals.title: Speed to power requires more transmission, not less competition
signals.summary: A complaint at FERC seeking to limit competition among transmission developers would inject uncertainty into the process and spur regulatory delays, writes Will Hazelip from National Grid Ventures US.

signals.title: MISO’s resource outlook improves as forecast generation additions outpace demand growth
signals.summary: The Midcontinent Independent System Operator is expected to have growing capacity surpluses over the next five years, according to the OMS-MISO survey.

signals.title: The Exploration Company completes drop test of Nyx capsule
signals.summary:
The Exploration Company performed a drop test of the Nyx spacecraft it is developing to transport cargo to low Earth orbit ahead of a 2028 test flight. 
 The post  The Exploration Company completes drop test of Nyx capsule  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Axiom Space adds more than $175 million to funding round
signals.summary:
Axiom Space announced June 4 that it added more than $175 million to its latest funding round, with Japan’s largest bank joining the company’s investors. 
 The post  Axiom Space adds more than $175 million to funding round  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Warren Buffett disciple Guy Spier built career on value investing. A rare cancer changed everything
signals.summary: After a glioblastoma diagnosis, value investor Guy Spier rethought wealth, time and legacy — and the impact he can have on rare disease research.

signals.title: The gold chart looks precarious. Here's how to profit
signals.summary: Gold is at a technically precarious juncture, and the good news for you is that options market may be mispricing the risk.

signals.title: No tech, no problem. Dow makes record and traders think these stocks can lead now
signals.summary: Traders bought about 5,300 calls in the State Street Health Care Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLV) on Thursday, compared to just over 1,000 puts, according to data from ThinkOrSwim.

signals.title: Odds of a Fed hike this year jump on prediction markets
signals.summary: Following an unexpectedly hot jobs report, prediction market traders see a 52% chance the Federal Reserve increases interest rates this year.

signals.title: Amazon unveils latest warehouse robot as tech giants continue AI layoffs
signals.summary: "Our experience of robots is that it's actually driven up employment rather than the reverse," Amazon executive John Boumphrey told CNBC.

signals.title: LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft's board after almost a decade
signals.summary: Reid Hoffman was one of OpenAI's first donors, and he left its board in 2023 as the nonprofit cozied up with Microsoft.

signals.title: Broadway's $1.9 billion season is the latest sign of consumers splurging on experiences
signals.summary: Sunday's Tony Awards follow a record-breaking season on Broadway. The awards often lead to further ticket sales for winning shows.

signals.title: Family offices bet on sports, from pickleball leagues to smart soccer balls
signals.summary: While AI startups dominate deal-making news, investment firms of the ultra-rich are still keen on sports.

signals.title: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
signals.summary: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.

signals.title: Lululemon cuts annual outlook, citing 'negative' media commentary and disappointing product launches
signals.summary: Lululemon is expecting its situation to get a lot worse before it gets better, as it issued weak guidance for the full year.

signals.title: AstroForge completes DeepSpace-2 spacecraft
signals.summary:
Asteroid mining startup AstroForge has completed assembly of its latest spacecraft for launch later this year, incorporating lessons from a failed mission last year. 
 The post  AstroForge completes DeepSpace-2 spacecraft  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Delian Asparouhov and Philip Johnston on making the case for orbital data centers
signals.summary:

signals.title: China builds institutional framework for space computing push
signals.summary:
China is establishing an industrial policy framework to support a push to build space-based computing infrastructure, with the emergence of influential coordinating bodies. 
 The post  China builds institutional framework for space computing push  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Hidden chemical weapons sites emerge in Syria amid fragile security transition
signals.summary: Over a decade after Syria agreed to dismantle its arsenal, international inspectors have uncovered scores of previously hidden chemical weapons materials.

signals.title: Dutch plant for combat-zone robots offers fresh supply pipeline for Ukraine
signals.summary: The facility has already produced its first THeMIS vehicle for the Dutch government, part of a run of more than 100 such robots pledged by the Netherlands.

signals.title: Rheinmetall sells struggling auto division to focus on defense
signals.summary: The unit will be sold to Aequita for a provisional €350 million, subject to potential adjustment when the deal closes, expected in the fourth quarter.

signals.title: Customer experience, better modeling can boost demand-side portfolio: report
signals.summary: The Brattle Group’s report lays out a framework for increasing demand-side resources to mitigate the impacts of load growth, variable renewables and distributed electrification.

signals.title: Inside the $850 million Obama Presidential Center ahead of its Juneteenth opening
signals.summary: President Obama's library will cost $30 to visit, making it the most expensive presidential museum or library in modern history.

signals.title: After cooperation on SMILE mission, ESA and China chart parallel but separate paths
signals.summary:
ESA and China recently launched the joint SMILE magnetosphere mission after a decade of cooperation, but despite similar goals, another collaboration appears distant. 
 The post  After cooperation on SMILE mission, ESA and China chart parallel but separate paths  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.summary:
Xona is developing a low Earth orbit network to provide backup to GPS-dependent systems

signals.title: Europe is rearming together — except in space
signals.summary:
Europe is rapidly rewriting its security architecture. Faced with Russian aggression, mounting doubts about long-term American commitment and growing pressure to shoulder more of its own defense burden, European states […]

signals.title: Muon Space unveils Starship-class satellite platform for orbital data centers
signals.summary:
Muon Space announced a Starship-class satellite platform June 3 designed from the ground up to meet the demands of the emerging orbital data center market, with an initial launch slated for 2028 after securing customers. 
 The post  Muon Space unveils Starship-class satellite platform for orbital data centers  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Blue Origin seeks to resume New Glenn launches by year’s end
signals.summary:
Blue Origin’s CEO says damage to its New Glenn launch pad is not as bad as feared and the rocket could return to flight by the end of the year. 
 The post  Blue Origin seeks to resume New Glenn launches by year’s end  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Experts warn terrorism threat is rising in Africa as US pulls back
signals.summary: A jihadist front is gaining ground across Africa, the Center for Strategic and International Studies warned in its annual risk analysis.

signals.title: US tells Europe, Canada to boost NATO air and naval forces
signals.summary: “Nations just need to assign the capabilities they have to NATO,” a spokesman for the alliance's military headquarters said.

signals.title: Gulf tensions escalate as Iran hits Kuwait, US strikes near Hormuz
signals.summary: CENTCOM said it had carried out a new round of defensive strikes in southern Iran, while an Iranian drone attack on the Kuwait airport killed one person.

signals.title: At a NATO range in Latvia, hits and misses mark Europe’s counter-drone journey
signals.summary: Drone technology is “a couple of steps ahead” of countermeasures, one officer said, with interceptors having to work every time to prevent losses.

signals.title: The US military wants to showcase battle-ready laser weapons by 2028
signals.summary: A directed energy demonstration is expected to occur during the summer of 2028, as part of a series of planned Golden Dome-related events.
